ddls:
CREATE TABLE "census_locations" (
  "census_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the census location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the census location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the census location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the census location (e.g., national, state, city) */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Estimated population size of the location */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates or reference */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the location details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "census_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census data entry */,
  "census_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census location */,
  "tru" TEXT /* Type of area (Total, Rural, Urban) */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column in the dataset */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistical variable */,
  "statistical_variable" TEXT /* Name of the statistical variable */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_census_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_location_id") REFERENCES census_locations ("census_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES census_years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_tru FOREIGN KEY ("tru") REFERENCES census_types ("census_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_column_name FOREIGN KEY ("column_name") REFERENCES census_columns ("column_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_statistical_variable FOREIGN KEY ("statistical_variable") REFERENCES statistical_variables ("variable_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_types" (
  "census_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census type */,
  "census_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the census type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the census type */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Description of the data coverage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the census type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistical variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistical variable */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the variable was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_columns" (
  "column_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each column */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the column */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the column */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the column */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the column was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("column_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "census_round" TEXT /* Identifier for the census round */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the census data collection started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the census data collection ended */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the year entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "census_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_files_census_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_data_id") REFERENCES census_data ("census_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "census_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census data the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the readme file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_readme_files_census_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_data_id") REFERENCES census_data ("census_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "census_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_census_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_data_id") REFERENCES census_data ("census_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "census_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census data */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, released, deprecated) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_versions_census_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_data_id") REFERENCES census_data ("census_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "parent_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent census data entry */,
  "child_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child census data entry */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent-child) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_relationships_child_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_data_id") REFERENCES census_data ("census_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_relationships_parent_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_data_id") REFERENCES census_data ("census_data_id")
)
